# CrewAI Raises $50M Series B for Multi-Agent Orchestration

CrewAI has closed a $50M Series B round led by Sequoia Capital to expand its role-based multi-agent orchestration platform. CEO Joao Moura announced the funding will accelerate enterprise adoption and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integration. CrewAI now supports 15 LLM providers including OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, and Google Gemini. The platform has grown to 50,000 monthly active developers, competing directly with LangChain and OpenAI Agents SDK.

**Key facts:** $50M Series B, Sequoia-led, 50K developers, MCP integration planned. **Impact:** Validates multi-agent orchestration as a venture-scale market.
